name: ReinforcementBase.StraightEndSymbolTypes
summary: The available straight end symbol types. See Tekla Structures help, "Reinforcement appearance", for more information.

enum_values.name: HooksOnInnerSide
enum_values.summary: Draws half hooks on the reinforcement's inner side.

enum_values.name: HooksOnOuterSide
enum_values.summary: Draws half hooks on the reinforcement's outer side.

enum_values.name: HookOnReinforcementStartOuterSide
enum_values.summary: Draws a half hook on the reinforcement's outer side in the reinforcement's start point, and another half hook on the inner side in the end point.

enum_values.name: HookOnReinforcementStartInnerSide
enum_values.summary: Draws a half hook on the reinforcement's inner side in the reinforcement's start point, and another half hook on the outer side in the end point.

enum_values.name: FullHooks
enum_values.summary: Draws full hooks in the reinforcement's end points.
